name: Sweet Layers
description: A beloved neighborhood bakery that has grown into one of Boston's most trusted wedding cake providers. Known for consistent quality, warm service, and classic designs that never go out of style.

dessert_alternatives.note: We love doing creative alternatives! Our donut walls and cookie bars are very popular. We can mix and match — e.g., small cutting cake + cupcake tower.

dietary_options.note: We offer gluten-free, vegan, and dairy-free options across most of our menu. GF/vegan cakes start at $2/serving upcharge.

eco_friendly.note: We've switched to compostable packaging as our default. No extra charge.

tasting_process.tasting_includes: Up to 6 flavors and 4 fillings for the couple plus 1 guest
tasting_process.note: Walk-in tasting sessions available on Saturdays. Fee credited toward final order.

service_area.note: $75 delivery within 20 miles. $100 additional for 20-40 miles. No delivery beyond 40 miles.

sweeteners: Free cupcake sampler (6 ct) with cake orders over $1000
Free donut wall rental with donut orders over $500

personality.tone: warm, approachable, enthusiastic but not pushy
personality.negotiation_approach: Flexible on pricing for larger orders. Happy to mix and match options to fit a budget. Will offer small discounts or throw in extras to close the deal.
quirks: Always suggests a cupcake tower as a crowd-pleaser backup
Loves sharing photos of past weddings on her phone
Remembers repeat customers by name and order history
